items.name_en: 💖Includes full original green box packaging💖Zippered wallet with GG details. Gucci leather goods push design boundaries, constantly reinterpreting classic pieces in a personalized way. This men's wallet combines classic GG Supreme canvas with black GG accessories, creating a refined accessory for modern fashion. Black leather trim, cloud-patterned fabric lining with GG details. Inside: 12 card slots, 3 bill compartments.

items.name_en: 💖Includes full original green gift bag💖Gucci Blondie series large tote bag. The circular interlocking double-G, a heritage design of the brand, is masterfully interpreted in the Gucci Blondie series. This Gucci Blondie series tote bag is masterfully crafted from brown suede, featuring a handle and chain shoulder strap design, and reinterpreting the brand's heritage with gold-tone accessories, showcasing the extraordinary charm of a classic piece. Brown suede
items.name_cn:
💖Includes full original green gift bag💖Gucci Blondie series large tote bag. The circular interlocking double-G, a heritage design of the brand, is masterfully interpreted in the Gucci Blondie series. This Gucci Blondie series tote bag is masterfully crafted from brown suede, featuring a handle and chain shoulder strap design, and reinterpreting the brand's heritage with gold-tone accessories, showcasing the extraordinary charm of a classic piece. Brown suede
Gold-tone accessories, microfiber lining, circular interlocking double-G. Interior: 1 zip pocket. Handle height 22cm, magnetic closure.

Color: Brown/suede.
Weight: approx. 1.3kg

items.name_en: 💖With full original green box packaging💖【New】GG Extra Mini Bag
items.name_cn:
💖With full original green box packaging💖【New】GG Extra Mini Bag
A shoulder bag from the Early Autumn Selection series, perfect for creating daily looks. Practical items are reinterpreted with a modern aesthetic philosophy, adorned with the classic interlocking G pattern. This extra mini bag is crafted in beige and blue classic GG canvas and leather, featuring an open pocket and an adjustable shoulder strap.
Beige and blue classic GG canvas and leather
Silver-tone hardware
Classic GG canvas lining
Exterior: one open pocket
Removable adjustable shoulder strap (55cm long)
Magnetic snap closure
Weight: approx. 0.47kg
Made in Italy
Model: 795213
Dimensions: 13(L) x 20(W) x 5cm(H)
Color: Blue canvas/Original leather
Made in Italy

items.name_en: 💖With full original green box packaging💖【New】GG Milano Mini Shoulder Bag
items.name_cn:
💖With full original green box packaging💖【New】GG Milano Mini Shoulder Bag
During Milan Fashion Week, the GG Milano handbag, created by Brand Creative Director Sabato De Sarno, debuted at the 2024 Fall/Winter Fashion Week, paying tribute to Milan, the city that inspired the design. This handbag features a new double-G motif, crafted from soft and smooth quilted fluffy leather. The chain strap adds styling versatility, easily creating a shoulder or crossbody look.
White fluffy leather
Glossy light gold-tone hardware
White leather lining
Double-G
D-ring buckle
One zip pocket with GG charm, one open pocket, and one lipstick organizer
Handle height 6.1 cm
Removable chain shoulder strap (approx. 50 cm)
Spring clip
Weight: approx. 0.5 kg
Model: 806017
Dimensions: 21(L) x 12.5(W) x 4.6(H)
Color: White full leather / Original leather
Italian creation

items.name_en: 💖With full original green box packaging💖【New】Gucci Bamboo 1947 series mini bamboo handbag. items.name_en: 💖With full original green box packaging💖【New】Gucci Luce series mini shoulder bag. The Gucci Luce collection exudes a playful and fun vibe, with "Luce" meaning "Light" in Italian. Original GG canvas infuses this elegant mini shoulder bag with design essence. Blue leather trim and light gold-tone hardware complement the beige and ebony pattern. An adjustable brown leather shoulder strap adds functionality. Beige and ebony classic GG canvas, blue leather, light gold-tone metal hardware, cotton-linen blend lining, Gucci monogram zipper pull, interior: one flat pocket, adjustable shoulder strap (20cm high), twist lock closure, weight: approx. 0.25kg.

items.name_en: 💖With full original green box packaging💖【New】Mini Bucket Shoulder Bag. This mini bucket shoulder bag is crafted from brown leather. This accessory features a hook closure, with a webbed shoulder strap design, cleverly blending functionality and modernity. Brown leather, light gold-tone metal hardware, red and green webbed shoulder strap, cotton-linen blend lining, zip pocket, with Gucci logo zip pull, shoulder strap (42cm high) hook closure.

items.name_en: 💖With full original green box packaging💖【New】The GG Milano handbag, created by Brand Creative Director Sabato De Sarno, debuted at the 2024 Fall/Winter Fashion Week, paying tribute to Milan, the city that inspired the design. This shoulder bag features a new double-G motif, crafted from soft and smooth GG embossed fluffy leather. The chain strap adds styling versatility, easily creating a crossbody look.
items.name_cn:
💖With full original green box packaging💖【New】The GG Milano handbag, created by Brand Creative Director Sabato De Sarno, debuted at the 2024 Fall/Winter Fashion Week, paying tribute to Milan, the city that inspired the design. This shoulder bag features a new double-G motif, crafted from soft and smooth GG embossed fluffy leather. The chain strap adds styling versatility, easily creating a crossbody look.
Fluffy leather
Glossy light gold-tone hardware
Leather lining
Double-G
D-ring buckle
One zip pocket with GG charm, one open pocket, and one lipstick organizer
Handle height 6.1 cm
Removable chain shoulder strap (approx. 50 cm)
Spring clip
Weight: approx. 0.5 kg
Model: 806017
Dimensions: 21(L) x 12.5(W) x 4.6(H)
Color: Wine red embossed leather / Original leather
Italian creation
